calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Ginsey Industries, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jordan M. Otis, of Moscone Emblidge & Otis LLP, Tel. 415.362.3599, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Ginsey Industries, Inc. is granted. All derivative claims are dismissed with prejudice. The dismissal does not include a waiver of fees and costs. Order and Consent Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
